title: ferray-random: integers() only returns i64 — no dtype parameter
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's Generator.integers(low, high, size, dtype=np.int64) accepts a dtype parameter to generate u8, i8, i16, i32, i64, u16, u32, u64 integers directly. ferray-random's integers() only returns Array<i64, Ix1>. For ML preprocessing (quantization, label generation) and image data (u8), generating in the target type avoids a cast. Add a generic version or typed variants.
